text: Mix {{flour}}, {{lemon_pepper}}, and {{salt}} in a mixing bowl.
Heat {{olive_oil}} in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Dredge {{chicken_breasts}} in the seasoned {{flour}} mixture, shaking off excess.
Cook {{chicken_breasts}} for 5–6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove {{chicken_breasts}} from the pan, place on a plate, and cover to keep warm.
Warm {{sauce_fat}} in the pan, then whisk in {{lemon_juice}} and season with additional {{salt}} to taste.
Spoon the lemon sauce over {{chicken_breasts}} and sprinkle with {{parsley}}. Enjoy.
